steps.title: Subtract 331.3 from both sides
steps.content:
Start with $v = 331.3 + 0.606T$. Subtract 331.3 from both sides:
$$v - 331.3 = 0.606T$$

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — '$T = \frac{v + 0.606}{331.3}$': Adds 0.606 and divides by 331.3 — incorrect algebraic manipulation. ✗
  • Choice B — '$T = \frac{v - 0.606}{331.3}$': Subtracts 0.606 and divides by 331.3 instead of subtracting 331.3 and dividing by 0.606. ✗
  • Choice C — '$T = \frac{v + 331.3}{0.606}$': Adds 331.3 instead of subtracting it. ✗
  • Choice D — '$T = \frac{v - 331.3}{0.606}$': Subtracts 331.3 then divides by 0.606, correctly inverting both operations. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
